creator: mjl@luckie.org.nz
text:
Hi Frederic

> Do you know if the tarball was regenerated after you submitted your PR and if
> yes, why?

I am both the maintainer of scamper on FreeBSD and the author of scamper 
itself.  Shortly after releasing 20111202a a null-pointer dereference 
was pointed out to me.  I fixed this and then regenerated the tarball.

SHA256 (scamper-cvs-20111202a.tar.gz) = 
e1c539d148e44854b8567945544d3a1c94e8d6ce40b7dc92671a41c4365642a3
SIZE (scamper-cvs-20111202a.tar.gz) = 1112165

Sorry about the hassle.

Matthew
